name: Boots Randolph
abstract: Homer Louis "Boots" Randolph III (June 3, 1927 – July 3, 2007) was an American musician. His 1963 saxophone hit "Yakety Sax" became the signature tune of The Benny Hill Show.

about_quotes.speaker: Gary Burton
about_quotes.evidence: he had heard about me from Boots Randolph, another Nashville musician... and had heard me play and recommended me.
about_quotes.doc_title: Gary Burton — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Eddie Miller and Pete Fountain
about_quotes.evidence: we have two shows coming out well one we did with Boots Randolph uh coming out this year
about_quotes.doc_title: Eddie Miller and Pete Fountain Interview, 1970-01-09

about_quotes.speaker: Diblasio
about_quotes.evidence: My dad loved Boots Randolph... I didn’t know Boots Randolph came from Coleman Hawkins.
